exercises.note: Problema comes from Greek and is masculine despite ending in -a, like most -ma nouns.
Mano is feminine despite ending in -o — a historical exception with no deeper pattern.

exercises.prompt: Which of these nouns is masculine, even though it ends in -a?
___ ciudad es muy antigua. (Fill in the article)

exercises.incorrectSentence: La problema es que no tenemos tiempo.
exercises.correctSentence: El problema es que no tenemos tiempo.

exercises.prompt: Match each noun to its correct article:
Complete with the correct article: '___ capital de España es Madrid.'
exercises.note: La capital = the capital city. El capital would mean 'the funds/money' instead — a different word.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blanks with el or la:
exercises.passage: {0} problema es serio: {1} sistema no funciona y {2} solución no está clara todavía.
